releaseNotes: Fixed the in-app updater failing to download - it always downloaded to the same filename, so a leftover file from any earlier update attempt silently blocked every update after it. Each attempt now starts clean, and a failed download shows a plain-English reason instead of just a code number. Also includes fixes from the last update: Movies/TV Shows freezing while the grid populated (large catalogs now load in small windows instead of all at once), the TV Guide showing garbled overlapping program titles (overlapping provider schedule entries are now cleaned up), and Multi-Screen freezing or getting stuck on one box while the other kept playing (both boxes now recover automatically from playback hiccups, with a leaner buffer profile for two simultaneous streams).
